home.about.title: Who We Are
home.about.subtitle: Where Heritage Meets Innovation
home.about.desc: Calligro is the world's leading digital academy dedicated to Arabic calligraphy, blending traditional mastery with cutting-edge interactive learning technology.
home.about.vision_desc: To be the digital bridge connecting the greatness of the past with the future of generations, keeping Arabic calligraphy alive and vibrant everywhere.
home.about.mission_desc: Providing an exceptional learning experience that empowers students to master calligraphy under the guidance of elite world-renowned calligraphers.
home.about.feature1.title: Interactive Learning
home.about.feature1.desc: Live sessions and precise technical feedback ensuring rapid development.
home.about.feature2.title: Global Masters
home.about.feature2.desc: Learn from calligraphers with official traditional certifications and international acclaim.
home.about.feature3.title: Flexible Access
home.about.feature3.desc: Learn anytime, anywhere through our advanced mobile and web applications.
about.page.title: Our Story
about.page.subtitle: From an Ambitious Idea to a Global Art Academy
about.ceo.title: Founder's Profile
about.ceo.name: Yazan Qattous
about.ceo.bio: A Software Engineer graduated from Princess Sumaya University of Technology (PSUT). With extensive experience in developing mobile apps and complex software systems, Yazan spearheaded the development of Calligro to become the ultimate destination for Arabic calligraphy enthusiasts, focusing on robust payment architectures and an unparalleled user experience.
about.roadmap.title: Our Vision
about.roadmap.step1.title: Digital Foundation
about.roadmap.step1.desc: Building state-of-the-art infrastructure and advanced mobile/web apps.
about.roadmap.step2.title: Global Expansion
about.roadmap.step2.desc: Onboarding elite calligraphers from all continents and multiple languages.
about.roadmap.step3.title: AI Integration
about.roadmap.step3.desc: Integrating AI technology for automated script analysis and correction.
about.roadmap.step4.title: Full Ecosystem
about.roadmap.step4.desc: Launching a complete art marketplace for buying and selling masterworks.

about.vision.title: Crafting the Digital Legacy
about.features.multi_project_desc: Managing diverse technology stacks from mobile apps to robust web platforms.
about.features.secure_payments_desc: Implementing global transaction architectures for seamless user enrollment.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1.title: 1. Data Collection
privacy.section1.content: At Calligro, we value your privacy. We collect minimal data required to provide our services and ensure a secure learning environment. This includes: Account Information (Email, Name, Profile Picture via Google/Apple Sign-In), Device Information for security, and Usage Data such as course progress and quiz results.
privacy.section2.title: 2. Payment Security
privacy.section2.content: Your financial security is our priority. We do not store credit card details on our servers. All web payments are processed securely by Lemon Squeezy, which acts as our Merchant of Record. Mobile payments are handled directly by Apple and Google. These providers utilize industry-standard encryption to protect your data.
privacy.section3.title: 3. Service Providers
privacy.section3.content: We utilize the following trusted third-party services to power Calligro Academy:
privacy.firebase.title: Firebase
privacy.firebase.content: Authentication, Database, and Cloud Function hosting.
privacy.jitsi.title: Jitsi
privacy.jitsi.content: Secure video streaming for live masterclass sessions.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Your Data Rights
privacy.section4.content: Under global privacy standards, you have the right to access, export, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data at any time. You can manage most of these settings directly through your Account Profile inside the Calligro app or portal.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1.title: 1. License & Intellectual Property
terms.section1.content: Welcome to Calligro Academy. By using our website and mobile application, you agree to these terms. All calligraphy lessons, videos, and downloadable materials are the intellectual property of Calligro and our Master Artists. You are granted a personal, non-transferable license to view these materials. You may not record, redistribute, or sell any content from this platform.
terms.section2.title: 2. Enrollment & Access
terms.section2.content: Your enrollment provides lifetime access to the specific course purchased, including all future updates to that course. Access is tied to your personal account and may not be shared.
terms.section3.title: 3. Refund Policy
terms.section3.web.title: Web Portal Purchases
terms.section3.web.content: Refunds are only available before the course has officially started and content has been accessed. Once a course session has begun or digital content has been consumed, no refunds will be issued.
terms.section3.mobile.title: In-App Purchases (iOS/Android)
terms.section3.mobile.content: Refunds for purchases made through the Calligro mobile app are managed exclusively by Apple (App Store) and Google (Play Store). Please refer to their respective refund processes.
terms.section4.title: 4. User Conduct
terms.section4.content: Students are expected to maintain a respectful environment in community forums and live sessions. We reserve the right to revoke access for any behavior that violates our community standards or disrupts the learning experience of others.
